name: blackveil-dns
description: DNS & email security scanner — 51 tools for SPF, DMARC, DKIM, DNSSEC, SSL, CAA, MTA-STS, and more. Powered by Blackveil Security.

tools.name: scan_domain
tools.description: Full DNS and email security audit. Score, grade, maturity, findings.

tools.name: check_spf
tools.description: Validate SPF syntax, policy, and trust surface.

tools.name: check_dmarc
tools.description: Validate DMARC policy, alignment, and reporting.

tools.name: check_dkim
tools.description: Probe DKIM selectors and validate key strength.

tools.name: check_dnssec
tools.description: Verify DNSSEC validation and DNSKEY/DS records.

tools.name: check_mx
tools.description: Validate MX records and email provider detection.

tools.name: check_ssl
tools.description: Verify SSL/TLS certificate and HTTPS config.

tools.name: check_mta_sts
tools.description: Validate MTA-STS SMTP encryption policy.

tools.name: check_ns
tools.description: Analyze NS delegation and provider diversity.

tools.name: check_caa
tools.description: Check authorized Certificate Authorities via CAA.

tools.name: check_bimi
tools.description: Validate BIMI record and VMC evidence.

tools.name: check_tlsrpt
tools.description: Validate TLS-RPT SMTP failure reporting.

tools.name: check_http_security
tools.description: Audit HTTP security headers (CSP, COOP, etc.).

tools.name: check_dane
tools.description: Verify DANE/TLSA certificate pinning.

tools.name: check_dane_https
tools.description: Verify DANE certificate pinning for HTTPS.

tools.name: check_svcb_https
tools.description: Validate HTTPS/SVCB records (RFC 9460).

tools.name: check_lookalikes
tools.description: Detect active typosquat/lookalike domains.

tools.name: check_shadow_domains
tools.description: Detect shadow/subdomain takeover risks.

tools.name: check_txt_hygiene
tools.description: Audit TXT record hygiene and accumulation.

tools.name: check_mx_reputation
tools.description: Check MX server IP reputation via DNSBLs.

tools.name: check_srv
tools.description: Discover SRV records for common services.

tools.name: check_zone_hygiene
tools.description: Audit DNS zone configuration hygiene.

tools.name: check_resolver_consistency
tools.description: Compare DNS responses across resolvers.

tools.name: assess_spoofability
tools.description: Assess email spoofing risk for a domain.

tools.name: compare_baseline
tools.description: Compare domain security against a policy baseline.

tools.name: generate_fix_plan
tools.description: Generate a prioritized remediation plan.

tools.name: generate_spf_record
tools.description: Generate an SPF record for a domain.

tools.name: generate_dmarc_record
tools.description: Generate a DMARC record for a domain.

tools.name: generate_dkim_config
tools.description: Generate DKIM configuration guidance.

tools.name: generate_mta_sts_policy
tools.description: Generate an MTA-STS policy for a domain.

tools.name: get_benchmark
tools.description: Get score benchmarks: percentiles, mean, top failures.

tools.name: get_provider_insights
tools.description: Get provider cohort benchmarks and common issues.

tools.name: explain_finding
tools.description: Explain a specific security finding in detail.

tools.name: check_subdomailing
tools.description: Detect SubdoMailing risk via SPF include chain analysis.

tools.name: batch_scan
tools.description: Scan up to 10 domains at once.

tools.name: compare_domains
tools.description: Side-by-side security comparison of 2-5 domains.

tools.name: map_supply_chain
tools.description: Map third-party service dependencies from DNS records.

tools.name: analyze_drift
tools.description: Compare current posture against a previous baseline.

tools.name: validate_fix
tools.description: Re-check a control after applying a fix.

tools.name: generate_rollout_plan
tools.description: Generate a phased DMARC enforcement timeline.

tools.name: resolve_spf_chain
tools.description: Trace the full SPF include chain for a domain.

tools.name: discover_subdomains
tools.description: Find subdomains via Certificate Transparency logs.

tools.name: map_compliance
tools.description: Map findings to NIST, PCI DSS, SOC 2, CIS Controls.

tools.name: simulate_attack_paths
tools.description: Enumerate attack paths with severity and mitigations.

tools.name: check_dbl
tools.description: Check domain reputation against Domain Block Lists.

tools.name: check_rbl
tools.description: Check MX server IP reputation against Blocklists.

tools.name: cymru_asn
tools.description: Map domain IPs to ASNs via Team Cymru DNS.

tools.name: rdap_lookup
tools.description: Fetch domain registration data via RDAP.

tools.name: check_nsec_walkability
tools.description: Assess DNSSEC zone walkability risk.

tools.name: check_dnssec_chain
tools.description: Walk the DNSSEC chain of trust from root.

tools.name: check_fast_flux
tools.description: Detect fast-flux DNS behavior.

bv_api_key.title: API Key
bv_api_key.description: Your Blackveil API key. Get one at blackveilsecurity.com
